prompt:
A beginner hydroponics setup on a workbench: a sturdy 20 L plastic tub with a fitted lid, six round holes holding six 50 mm net pots, and a small airline grommet seated cleanly in the lid. The tub is empty or lightly filled to show the build clearly, with a short length of clear tubing and a small air stone placed beside it to communicate the aeration concept without clutter.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk maker-lab setting: soft cinematic lighting, clean plastics and edges, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Composition is centered and simple so the tub-and-net-pot arrangement reads instantly as an inventory icon.
